methods.method_name: air-dried material fractured using finger nails, forceps, diagonal cutters, or a small hammer and cold chisel
mounted on stubs using adhesive tabs double sided carbon tape and colloidal silver liquid
stored in a desiccators for at least 24 h prior to examination
coated with gold for 4-6 min in an Emitech K550X
examined with a Zeiss EVO 40 scanning electron microscope with an accelerating voltage of 15.34 kV
description of the new species following the new botanical code of nomenclature
